title: Corail Tombstone Redrawn
body:
This texture pack contains modified textures from the [Corail Tombstone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corail-tombstone) mod. The original textures of this mod have a high resolution, so I decided to redraw them under the style of Minecraft (16x16). Texture pack does not change any sounds.
**(see detailed changes in the gallery)**
# Blocks
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b06dab2a5f601b51ddb6c7c315e25bd0f1ce0f92.jpeg)
# Items
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eed4672f93d1da361cb4839b9e4ed0c441cbf75c.jpeg)
# Effects
![effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/786ef24faddf739bd8b8260a1e8305bad4f8595c.jpeg)
# What's the point of this?
My texture pack makes the textures from this mod fit the overall style of the game.
